data_source: synthetic (Poisson, cosine tuning, mimics MC_Maze statistics)
data_note: NLB MC_Maze download attempted via nlb_tools but requires DANDI authentication and dataset registration. Synthetic data uses Poisson spike trains with cosine directional tuning, mean firing rates 10-50 Hz, 100 neurons, 200 trials, 1s duration.

cauwenberghs_2026_bound.reference: Chen, Ahsan, Chakrabartty, Leugering, Cauwenberghs. Phys Rev E 113, 035311 (2026).
